meaning: n.批评家,评论家,吹毛求疵者
examples: Turner is a writer and critic.
He was also for a time an art critic.
He was a stern critic but an extremely kindly man.
Salon book critic Laura Miller picks novel Bangkok Tattoo as her top summer read.
And one Alaska industry critic, Richard Fineberg of Fairbanks, says corrosion problems have not been adequately monitored.
